input_identity.common_session_rule: Within the overlap from the latest symbol-specific first date through the earliest symbol-specific last date, inspect the union of source dates before forming the intersection; any union date missing any frozen symbol blocks the input. No forward fill or calendar substitution.
input_identity.row_rule: Every symbol-date key is unique and every required price is finite and strictly positive.
input_identity.consumed_common_session_hash: SHA256 of ordered trade_date then SPY,QQQ,GLD raw_open,adj_open,adj_close values

strategy.decision: final exact common source session of each calendar month at close
strategy.execution: next exact common source session at open
strategy.selection: highest momentum among SPY,QQQ,GLD with exact tie order SPY then QQQ then GLD
strategy.absolute_gate: selected momentum strictly greater than zero selects that asset; zero or negative selects CASH
strategy.target: one selected asset at 100 percent or CASH at 100 percent
strategy.forbidden_filters: no additional trend, volatility, breadth, drawdown, macro, weekday or calendar filter

accounting.buy_shares: floor(available_cash / (raw_open * (1 + one_way_cost_rate))) so transaction cost is included in affordability
accounting.same_asset: retain shares and anchor with zero artificial sale, purchase or rebalance
accounting.changed_asset: sell old asset first at adjusted-open-ratio marked value with one-way sale cost, then buy new asset at raw open with separate one-way purchase cost
accounting.cash_transition: sell active asset once and retain cash at zero return
accounting.terminal_liquidation: sell every remaining position exactly once on the final accepted split session; no terminal rebalance
accounting.one_way_turnover: sum of executed notionals divided by account NAV immediately before the trade; simultaneous B2 basket legs share one pre-basket account NAV denominator at initial purchase and terminal liquidation
accounting.cost_drag: sum of explicit transaction costs in USD divided by initial capital
accounting.whole_share_cash_utilization: mean executed raw purchase notional divided by pre-purchase available account or leg capital

splits.complete_interval_rule: decision, entry and next-rebalance exit must all be inside the same split; every cross-split or terminally incomplete interval is purged in full
splits.combined: concatenate validation then holdout daily net-return streams into one continuous wealth path without resetting the peak; each source split still bears its own initial and terminal account trades

comparators.B1_SPY_BUY_HOLD: whole-share SPY bought at the first split raw open and liquidated once at the final split adjusted-open-ratio value
comparators.B2_STATIC_EQUAL_WEIGHT_SPY_QQQ_GLD: three independent USD 40000/3 legs, one per asset, each buying whole shares at the first split raw open, retaining its own residual cash, never rebalancing or cross-subsidizing, and liquidating once at the final split session

metrics.cagr: (terminal wealth / initial wealth) ** (365.25 / actual calendar days from first through last accepted observation) - 1; nonpositive wealth or zero days blocks
metrics.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation of accepted daily net returns times sqrt(252)
metrics.daily_maximum_drawdown: minimum wealth divided by the running peak minus one over the complete daily path, with the initial USD 40000 peak included
metrics.calmar: CAGR divided by absolute daily maximum drawdown; null when drawdown is zero
metrics.positive_month_fraction: fraction of complete intervals with positive net account return; the first interval starts from USD 40000 before its initial trade, each later interval starts from post-trade NAV at its entry/previous exit, and every interval ends at post-trade NAV on its exit so every cost is assigned once
metrics.time_in_market: fraction of accepted daily observations with positive risky-asset marked value
metrics.largest_calendar_year_profit_contributio: max(max(year_profit,0)) / sum(max(year_profit,0)); a missing or nonpositive positive-profit pool is null and fails its gate

primary_gates: holdout B3 daily maximum drawdown is less severe than B1
holdout B3 Calmar is strictly greater than both B1 and B2
combined validation plus holdout B3 CAGR is positive and at least 50 percent of B1 CAGR
combined validation plus holdout B3 Calmar is strictly greater than B2 Calmar
at 30 bps combined B3 CAGR > 0 and largest calendar-year positive-profit contribution < 40 percent
zero duplicate missing nonfinite identity whole-share or database failures
stop_rule: After input qualification, execute exactly once. Any failed gate returns RETROSPECTIVE_DUAL_MOMENTUM_FAIL. Do not retune, rerun, substitute data, alter the assets, lookback, tie order, cash gate, costs, splits or gates.
